関連科目: This is a high-level "content-based" course. Therefore, it is preferable for students to have already taken similar high-level courses like: Listening and Speaking 3, Critical Writing, language and Communication
授業方法: Lessons will be designed to foster student autonomy and enhance students' ability to critically assess written materials and oral presentations/lectures in and English-only environment. Students are expected to actively engage in class discussions based on teacher lectures or previously assigned readings or homework.Additionally, students can expect to regularly discuss and review course content in pairs or small groups as well as providing individual oral presentations utilized in class

トピック.授業計画1: Note: This syllabus may be subject to revisions according to student needs and abilities.
トピック.授業外学習2:
Students must have regular access to computers and the internet either at home or through an on-campus computer lab.

The amount of study time for homework will vary from week to week and will depend on 1) the content being reviewed, and 2) the ability of individual students to understand the content. However, students can expect to do a minimum of 2 hours and a maximum of 4 hours of study each week in preparation for or prior to completing an assignment for homework

教科書/Required texts0: No Textbook - Materials provided by the teacher

成績評価Grading1: In-class activities and discussion tasks: 30%  Writing Assignments/Homework: 20%; Research sources: 20%; Final project/presentation  30%

備考Note0: This is an all-English classroom: please come to class prepared for this and encourage each other to speak and discuss extensively in English, in order to gain maximum participation points. Note that speaking in Japanese limits your classmates’ learning opportunities.
